_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox at Guardians preview: Sonny Gray vs Parker Messick, 4:10 first pitch
items.snark: Gray's got a shot at redemption, and Cleveland's rookie lefty Messick has been filthy all year.

items.headline: Red Sox 10 games under .500 for first time since 2020, lost 6 of last 7
items.snark: Dead last in runs scored, 1 and 7 and 1 in series play at Fenway, time to burn it down.

items.headline: Roman Anthony suffers another setback, shut down from swinging after discomfort
items.snark: Sports doc accuses Sox of lies on the injury, Roman's out indefinitely, season spiraling.

items.headline: Brayan Bello gives Sox a chance in bulk role, offense falls short in 4 to 3 loss
items.snark: Bello looks like Cy Young out of the pen and a beer leaguer as a starter, make it make sense.

items.headline: Red Sox open series at Cleveland, Samaniego opener before Bello follows
items.snark: Opener strategy is back because Breslow doesn't trust his starters to give him six outs without hemorrhaging runs.

items.headline: Willson Contreras extends hitting streak to 11 games, tied for longest in MLB
items.snark: Only guy on the roster who remembered how to swing a bat, turns out the Cubs knew what they were doing.

items.headline: Sox 1 and 7 and 1 in series play at Fenway, dropped another homestand Thursday
items.snark: Fenway is supposed to be a fortress, instead it's a hospice where opposing pitchers rehab their ERAs.

items.headline: Braves hammer Red Sox 10 to 2, Greg Weissert blows up again in sixth inning
items.snark: Weissert serving up meatballs like it's Thanksgiving and the bullpen is the family that won't stop asking for seconds.

items.headline: Willson Contreras extends hitting streak to 11 games, tied for longest active in MLB
items.snark: Contreras is the only guy hitting and it still doesn't matter because nobody else can find a bat.

items.headline: Tyler Samaniego opener before Bello tonight, Garrett Whitlock to IL with knee injury
items.snark: Whitlock hyperextended his knee on the muddy Fenway mound, this franchise is cursed by God himself.

items.headline: Mike Onwenu takes big pay cut in reworked contract, frees up cap space for Brown deal
items.snark: Onwenu gave back cash to help land AJ, that's a team guy or a hostage negotiation.
